meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Project Management to Scale AI Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Master advanced project management for AI freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-value, scalable solutions.
content.answer_block: Break through the 'basic app' ceiling by shifting from ad-hoc coding to architecture-first project management. By integrating Antigravity for structural scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous execution, you transform your workflow from manual labor into a systematic delivery engine, allowing you to ship enterprise-grade AI features in record time.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you’re stuck in the loop of building CRUD apps that impress no one and scale even less. Clients are asking for production-ready AI agents, but your current process is bottlenecked by manual boilerplate and fragmented logic. You aren't lacking skill; you are lacking a high-velocity delivery framework that forces architectural discipline.

It’s time to move beyond the 'tutorial trap.' By treating your development process like a product pipeline—using Antigravity to architect your state machines and Claude Code to handle the heavy-lifting of iterative refinement—you can bridge the gap between basic prototypes and high-value, scalable AI SaaS solutions.

steps.title: Architect the Domain Model
steps.description: Before writing code, define your data entities and relationships to ensure the foundation can support complex AI logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust schema definition for a multi-tenant AI SaaS platform, focusing on modular user roles and session-based state management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --tasks 'Generate Prisma schema based on the Antigravity architecture output'

steps.title: Establish the AI Orchestration Layer
steps.description: Implement a modular agentic workflow that separates business logic from LLM calls to prevent tight coupling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a high-level orchestration interface for an agentic workflow that handles tool-calling, memory retrieval, and output validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --pattern 'src/agents/*' --context 'Use the orchestration interface defined in Antigravity'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the repetitive infrastructure code based on your validated architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized project structure that separates API routes, service layers, and AI model providers.

steps.title: Implement Test-Driven AI Development
steps.description: Force the AI to write tests for every feature it builds, ensuring your production code remains stable under load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit and integration tests for the primary agentic loop, focusing on edge case handling for LLM timeouts.

steps.title: Deploy and Monitor via CLI
steps.description: Use automated deployment scripts to push updates without manual intervention, maintaining high velocity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CI/CD deployment script that runs pre-flight sanity checks on the AI service before production rollout.

pro_tips: Always store your 'Architecture State' as a versioned JSON file in your repo so Claude Code can reference the source of truth.
Use Antigravity to generate 'negative test cases'—forcing the AI to anticipate failure modes before you write a single line of code.
Implement a 'Human-in-the-Loop' flag in your Claude Code configs to pause for approval on API-heavy tasks.
Treat your project documentation as a living prompt; if the code changes, update the Antigravity context immediately.
Batch your AI requests; never let the LLM handle more than one architectural component per execution cycle to prevent logic drift.
content.next_steps: Review your current project architecture using these tools, identify one manual bottleneck, and automate it using the Claude Code CLI.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic apps and start building the AI future your clients are paying for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
